title: Oral-B Stages Power Kids Disney Frozen Battery Toothbrush with Timer App
description:
Product Description
The Oral B Stages Power Battery toothbrush is designed especially for children. With fun, colourful designs and soft bristles, the toothbrush is a fun way for kids to learn. Assorted models dispatched.
Directions
Dentists recommend replacing your toothbrush every 3 months, or when bristles are faded and worn, for a better clean Safety Warning Periodically check the cord for damage.
Dentists recommend replacing your toothbrush every 3 months, or when bristles are faded and worn, for a better clean Safety Warning Periodically check the cord for damage.
If the cord is damaged, take the charging unit to an Oral-B Braun Service Centre. A damaged or non-functioning unit must no longer be used. Not intended for use by children under age of 3 years.

features: Designed to help children brush teeth longer and better - appropriate for children aged 3 years +
The rotating brush head has a raised center row to clean chewing surfaces where cavities tend to form
Ergonomic handle designed for children’s small hands
Power battery toothbrush
Assorted models
Oral-B Toothbrush

reviews.title: Edit: Good for my 2 year old
reviews.text:
I realize it says it's a kids toothbrush but it's huge! It's bigger than a regular sized brush for adults. I intended this for my 2 year old for Christmas. It's my fault for not looking at details. I've been searching for an Olaf one and this was on sale. I have not tried it but will update when we do...

Update: I gave this to my daughter early because she saw Olaf. It does fit in her mouth and the on/off buttons are easy for her to push. It's her favorite color, purple. She actually brushes her teeth. Well the toothbrush does the work! I don't see a timer on it. So far, the battery is doing fine. My biggest concern is replacing the head. It's already looking like I should replace.

title: grabease Double-Sided Toothbrush for Ages 6 Months to 4 Years, Soft Bristles & Choke Protection Shield, BPA-Free, 1 Pack, Yellow
features: INDEPENDENT TOOTHBRUSHING: Introducing our game-changing toothbrush designed for independent toothbrushing in babies, toddlers, and preschool kids aged 6 months to 4 years! With its two-sided design, this toothbrush encourages a positive approach to oral hygiene. The pack includes one double-sided toothbrush that's perfect for little hands, and a silicone finger brush for gentle gum massage. This toddler toothbrush is ideal for a child's first toothbrush, making dental care fun and easy.

DOUBLE-SIDED TOOTHBRUSH: Our toothbrush is designed to give your child a dazzling smile in no time! The innovative, tapered bristles on both sides of this brush offer maximum contact with teeth - perfect for easily-distracted little ones. Plus, a bonus finger toothbrush is included, ideal for infants, and kids experiencing sensory or sensitivity issues. Ensure your child's dental care starts off strong with our versatile brush set.

SOFT BRISTLES & CHOKE PROTECTION: Our patented design ensures a safe, mess-free tooth cleaning experience for both toddlers and parents. With a built-in choke barrier, the Brush prevents over-insertion and gagging. The soft, flexible bristles are gentle on tender gums and new baby teeth. This versatile toothbrush is a must-have for your baby's first dental care kit - perfect for toddlers, first-time brushers, and those transitioning from finger toothbrushes.

EXPERT APPROVED: Specially designed for infants and toddlers, our patented toothbrush has the seal of approval from top pediatric dentists. With endorsements from the American Academy of Pediatric Dentistry, you can trust that our product is perfect for your child's needs. Remember to replace every 3-4 months for optimal oral hygiene. Shop with confidence, as our brushes ensure a safe, effective start to your baby's dental journey. Order spares or stock up now!

CERTIFIED SAFE: Meticulously lab-tested to meet the most stringent USA safety standards for your baby's wellbeing. Our toothbrushes are 100% BPA, lead, and phthalate-free, ensuring your child's safety as they learn proper oral hygiene. Guide your child with our double-sided toothbrush designed specifically for their needs - from their first tooth to confident self-brushing as a toddler. Create healthy habits under your loving supervision with Grabease.

reviews.title: Not a primary toothbrush
reviews.text: It’s hard-to-impossible to clean the front of my 18 month olds teeth with this. It’s too big. I can use a different brush for that, and then give this to him to “play with” for a few minutes. He makes gagging sounds but it is safe, of course; it’s just much bigger than other baby brushes. I’d save for older toddlers and even then it might be hard for fronts of teeth.

Designed to work with all click-on Sonicare models, these brush heads remove up to 20x more plaque than a manual toothbrush while gently improving gum health up to 15x in six weeks (vs. a manual toothbrush). Subscribe & Save on genuine Philips Sonicare brush head replacements and save up to 15%.
features: Removes up to 20x more plaque than a manual toothbrush
Up to 15x healthier gums in 6 weeks vs. a manual toothbrush
Triangular tips brush away stains for whiter teeth in just 2 days (vs. a manual toothbrush, with whitening toothpaste)

reviews.title: Best of the Philips brushes
reviews.text:
I've been using Sonicare for 20 years and I find these A3 heads do the best at cleaning my teeth. The C3 are not too far behind, and the C1 are not far behind those. I just use the old rubbing the tongue on my teeth technique, but with the A3, I seem to go longer before I feel like I need a teeth cleaning at the dentist.
I've also used multiple 3rd party heads and none of them even come close to cleaning like the Philips heads. It's just too bad these things are so expensive, I'll probably stick to the C1 heads unless I see the A3 heads go on sale.

reviews.title: My hygienist noticed a difference!
reviews.text: Used to use the C3s. They are smaller and a bit less comfortable to use than this variant. The main winning point is that my hygienist said "what are you doing differently, your mouth looks way better than usual." I take that as an endorsement, and will continue to use these!

reviews.title: It’s a brush head
reviews.text: It’s a brush head

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: These are great toothbrush heads and fit my sonicare perfectly. Cleans teeth well. Would recommend.

reviews.title: Overpriced vs C2
reviews.text: I don’t know what a $15 replacement brush head needs to do to earn 5 stars but this just doesn’t blow me away. I typically buy the C2 replacements, I’ve also used C1 and C3. This is comparable to C3 it’s soft and gives a good clean. I can tell a difference between this and C1 or C2 but when I was using even C1 (which feels harder and I don’t like this one as much C2 is my go to) I didn’t have a cavity and my dentist said I was looking good. I do like that this head tells me when to swap out (C1 doesn’t) but $15 for a replacement is steep considering my toothbrush was $30. I will say after my second root canal I made the switch to a Phillips soniccare and since switching to sonic care from a traditional toothbrush I haven’t had any cavities. So I think using the soniccare with whatever heads you can afford is great for your dental health!

title: GUM Crayola Twistables Kids Toothbrush with Fun Twisting Head, Soft Bristles, Ages 3+ (Pack of 4) -230TT
description:
Product Description
Getting your kids excited about their daily tooth brushing routine requires more than just an ordinary kids toothbrush. Give them the fun and functional GUM Crayola Twistables Toothbrush for kids. It’s one of the best toothbrushes to keep kids engaged with bright and colorful handles, as well as a twistable head that can be extended from the toothbrush handle with a twist of the bottom green knob. When not in use, kids can twist the toothbrush back and store upside down in the included toothbrush cap. The cap doubles as a stand to keep the brush from rolling off the bathroom sink. This toothbrush also comes with soft, antibacterial bristles to further inhibit germ growth. The toothpaste sweet spot is highlighted by the colored bristles in the center of the compact head to teach children how much toothpaste they should be using. If you want to equip your little ones with a kids' toothbrush that will get them enthusiastic about their twice-daily tooth brushing routine, the GUM Crayola Twistable Toothbrush is what you need.
Manufacturer Contact Information
1-888-777-3116
features: EXTENDABLE TOOTHBRUSH HEAD: Twist the green knob on the handle to extend the compact toothbrush head for a fun and functional cleaning experience

KIDS TOOTHBRUSH CAP & STAND: Convenient antibacterial cap and stand to keep the brush from rolling off the sink. When it’s time to travel, pop the cap on top to cover the brush – perfect for road trips, camping, and sleepovers
CLINICALLY PROVEN BRISTLES: GUM Dome Trim brushes feature a raised center bristle design that provides greater contact with the tooth surface, while also reaching under the gum line
TOOTHPASTE SWEET SPOT: The compact head features colored centered soft bristles that teach children where to place their toothpaste and how much paste is needed
THE GUM MISSION: We are committed to helping people of all ages have stronger, healthier teeth, and gums by providing high quality, innovative oral care products that promote optimal dental health

reviews.title: Meh its ok
reviews.text: Its just a cheap what you would get for free at the kids dentist office kind of brush. Its totally flat but thats not a huge deal for me. The brush twisting gets my kids more into brushing their teeth but when I am brushing, the brush itself doesn't lock into place as as you are going around in their mouth and moving your hand it twists and doesn't stay in place. So I am typically adjusting at least once mid brush. Usually my kiddos are good about brushing but they have their days so its those days its really an issue for me. For the price it isn't worth it for me.

reviews.title: Great product! Decent price!
reviews.text: (Picture only shows three but there were four) adorable colors and tons of fun for my four year old. I thought they twisted all the way down but actually the head stays out then u use the stand as a cover which is what I needed since hes always knocking stuff off the bathroom sink. Will recommend to friends and family, and buy again in the future, really great product!

reviews.title: A bit too soft
reviews.text:
I ordered this to replace the disposable Colgate electric toothbrush I use for travel. The Colgate does not have replaceable batteries and is a bit large for my kit, but prevents me from carrying my Sonicare. I was hopeful this would be a good replacement.

It's not quite there. The size is okay, but the bristles are very soft and the motion is very gentle. You won't hurt yourself with it, but it has nothing on the cheap Colgate or expensive Sonicare. The other problem is that the cap doesn't post onto the base. That wouldn't have been hard for them to do.

It is a gentle electric toothbrush, just too gentle for my needs.

reviews.text: I only use this for spending one night in a hotel, it works OK for that but don't expect it to be as vigorous as the much larger Phillips Sonicare.

reviews.title: No stand
reviews.text: I wish it had a stand to hold it upright. The toothbrush quit working. Waste of money

reviews.title: Battery life is NOT what it claims
reviews.text: I've been trying to give this toothbrush the benefit of the doubt, but I give up. I charge it, and for 15 seconds it runs full strength, then slowly declines like my older brush was doing, not holding a charge. Not sure when this was manufactured, or how old the battery is, but it's not holding a charge. It will not run for 365 days on one charge, that's for sure. I will have to return.

reviews.title: Worth every cent
reviews.text: Works wonderfully . Especially for the price

reviews.title: 8 Heads more important than you might think
reviews.text:
I've been trying a bunch of similar toothbrushes lately. First off, most of the brands do not have interchangeable heads, so many of these will end up getting thrown out once the heads are used. For that reason, getting 8 heads with this is an important feature, because at least for the current price, you could hardly buy 8 disposable brushes.

One of the things I like about some others is when they have an induction charger that also acts like a little dock (of those, I prefer the ones with a USB plug rather than an AC plug). Those normally charge a premium, but this one is inexpensive, so at least they have that going for it. It's not like you have to charge it often (although definitely more than once a year), but laying a toothbrush down to plug it in is cumbersome, and it takes a while to charge.

I don't want or need the 30/120 second timers, but every single one I've ever seen (of the "sonic" type) has had that, so how can I complain? I end up brushing for 6-10 minutes most of the time.

Not a bad version of the less expensive off-brand options, but I don't think anyone can predict the future as to if and for how long replacement heads will be available.

reviews.title: Great Electric Toothbrush
reviews.text: Solid and strong vibration and easy to use sonic electric toothbrush. I got this for my husband and so far he is happy with this sonic electric toothbrush. THANKS

features: [What's Included] The Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Manual Toothbrush Pack includes 6 multi-colored Hot Wheels kid's toothbrushes.

[Great for Toddlers] Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Toothbrushes are a great introduction to oral care for your toddlers and young children! The small head size and ergonomic handles are ideal for little ones as they learn to brush their teeth.

[Rotate Regularly] Although dentists recommend a new toothbrush every 90 days, it's important to swap your child's toothbrush after they get sick, too!

reviews.title: No good
reviews.text:
I ordered this for my son, and he loved it so much! He had fun brushing his teeth and did such a good job.
For like 2 weeks.
The battery is not waterproofed, so it is all getting wet every time you brush and rinse. So now it doesn't work. I thought it was just a dead battery, but nope. It all got wet and is ruined.
I'm super disappointed. You would think something like a toothbrush would be better sealed to prevent such a thing from happening. And of course, it died right after the return deadline.
Save yourself the money and drama of explaining to a toddler why he can't use his Blippi brush anymore.

reviews.title: good value
reviews.text: for my grandson he loved them

reviews.title: Works as needed.
reviews.text: You get what you pay for. These kids toothbrushes aren’t expensive and what you receive is good value for the money. Yes, some of the toothbrushes get loosened fibers over time, but we don’t keep them long enough to reach that point. The more aggressive of a brusher you are, the quicker you need to replace them. I find that they don’t last 3 months with good consistent brushing, as the quality declines with usage. Overall I’m happy with these for my son, just remember to switch them out within three months. The design is a great bonus for kids that enjoy HotWheels!

reviews.title: good purchase
reviews.text: good purchase but if you have a toddler who likes to chew on the bristles then you’ll realize the bristles can come out.. so just watch out

reviews.title: Good cheap toddler toothbrushes.
reviews.text: My toddler destroys and flattens bristles. These are cheap enough that It doesn’t break the bank when she needs a new one every few weeks. Bristles also don’t fall out. Will order again.

reviews.title: Make a softer brush
reviews.text: It cleans well, the bristles are not soft. I use it for my son with sensory issues. If they could make a brush with soft bristles, I would buy in bulk!

reviews.title: Fraction of the work of normal toothbrushes!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are great. I have been using the Mentadent (similar type of brush for adults) brushes on my teeth for years and can't find them anymore. I came across these brushes for my autistic child from a therapist. It allows me to brush their teeth in half the time and more precisely than when I try a regular toothbrush. It also helps them learn to brush their teeth with less frustration while hitting more areas of the teeth. Its a great concept and I am really surprised the regular toothbrush manufacturers aren't making these and putting them in stores everywhere.  The downside is the price- I do wish they were cheaper.

reviews.title: Lightweight brush that packs a punch
reviews.text:
What I like:

-lightweight and compact in size
-only one button to cycle through modes and turn it off
-comes with (3) brush heads
-includes USB power cord
-will fit in my toothbrush holder

What I don't like:

-need to buy power adapter to charge it

This isn't a fancy sonic toothbrush. If you're looking for a basic electric toothbrush that's a step above the type you'd buy at the grocery store (that takes two AA batteries - you know the one), this will do it. The toothbrush cleaned my teeth well with a good amount of vibration of the bristles. I'm pretty pleased.

reviews.title: Toothbrush
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:fa007684a8fa5379afdcdb30ceda64f4]] At first I couldn’t get over the vibration, but after using it a couple times I couldn’t get over how polished & white my teeth were! This toothbrush has become top tier in my dental hygiene. 10/10

★US DuPont Bristles: Our brushes are made with DuPont bristles, which is the most representative high-quality nylon bristles. DuPont bristles mainly have the following advantages: high tenacity, strong bending recovery, outstanding wear resistance, and perfect cleaning power.

★Durable brush: Thanks to DuPont bristles, our brush can be used for a long time without being easily deformed, the service life varies according to the brushing strength of each person: from 2 months for high brushing intensity to 3 months for moderate brushing intensity

★End-rounded bristles: For our brush bristles, we have adopted a variety of top-rounding techniques. The protruding bristles on the upper, middle and lower parts of the brush undergo the first rounding process; then the concave part is rounded for the second time to ensure that each bunch of bristles meet the standard. The multi-process is only to better protect your teeth and oral health

★High density bristles: The toothbrush head adopts the latest bristle planting technology, and the number of bristles has increased by 2 times. The bottom of each bunch of bristles is fixed with metal copper sheets, which can prevent bristle shed, increase the durability of the brush head, and greatly improve the cleaning ability.

★Vibration isolation and noise reduction: 306 stainless steel is used at the interface between the bottom of the toothbrush and the electric toothbrush, which can effectively reduce shake and noise, moreover, be more resistant to corrosion. Copper sheet is used inside the brush body to conduct sonic waves, improving the sonic wave transmission efficiency and the cleaning capacity by 5 times.

★Suitable for Home Use: If you purchase our product, you will receive 8 replacement toothbrush heads neatly placed in a blister case. Each brush head has its own color markings at the bottom and back, making it easy to distinguish without worrying about confusion.
★Bacterial Protection Bristles :The special bacterial protection bristles help to keep your brush head clean and inhibit bacterial growth on the brush.

★HYGIENIC CAP :Each replacement sonicare brush head comes with a hygienic secure cover to keep your bristle free of dust and debris. You don't have to worry about bacteria that might cause you dental problems.

★Reminder bristles: Our Green indicator bristles discolour to let you know when to replace them, don't need to worry or guess. Dentists recommend replacing the brush head at least once every 3 months.

reviews.title: Works great with my sonicare
reviews.text: Works great and a good price . Good purchase, very happy with them

reviews.title: A Great Replacement
reviews.text: I'm not sure which model toothbrush I have, only that it's pretty basic and several years old, but still going strong. These brush heads are a perfect fit and work just like the brand name. I did find these to be a bit larger than the one I replaced, and the bristles were a bit longer, so it just felt bigger in my mouth overall. That being said, the bristles on these are softer and I find them to be gentler on my sensitive gums, even with the bigger brush size. Each brush has a colored dot (4 different colors) to differentiate between them if necessary. Overall, I'm happy with these.

reviews.title: Good affordable ootion
reviews.text: These brush heads are a good replacement option at an amazing price.

reviews.title: Works well for my Philips Sonicare 4100
reviews.text: This 8-pack of replacement brush heads for several Philips sonicare rechargeable toothbrush models fits my Sonicare 4100 perfectly. Popped on smoothly with no weird gaps. These are a larger size compared to the small Phillips diamond head style that I have been using and I've included a photo of a comparison showing this new replacement and the Philips sonicare branded brush side by side. I was worried they wouldn't be soft, but they are and I'm pleased with the bristles. After using for a week, I am glad I tried them and wouldn't hesitate to continue to use these and save some money.

reviews.title: Soft bristles
reviews.text:
I was running low on my Sonicare heads so I decided to give these a try, excited because they are a fraction of the cost of the name brand kind, especially for a package of 8.

They fit the handle just fine, but they aren’t chip-enabled to work with the automatic brush change reminder light on several Sonicare handles. So like regular toothbrushes you have to keep track of when you need to change it again.

I put my old ready-to-be-changed head back on immediately, as these bristles aren’t even close to “medium” hardness. They are SOFT. My old head has much stiffer-bristles than this new one, which I prefer.

I gave it a 2 rating because they do work for my Sonicare brush handle just fine, but they don’t work for me personally. If you need soft for sensitive gums, then these are for you.

You can’t go wrong with the Gum Care setting and these replacement heads if you need soft bristles. For the price, a pack of 8 is a steal!

They just aren’t for me, they are way too soft, I’m bummed.

title: evowera Smart Manual Toothbrush Age 9+, Uncleaned Area Reminder, Pressure Reminder, Coaching App, Timer, Color Display, WiFi Compatible, Soft Bristle, Message Function, BPA Free, Kids Toothbrush, Blue
features: 【Uncleaned Reminder Helps Build Kids' Habit】Kids can view their cleaned and uncleaned area from the color screen of the smart toothbrush, no app or phone is required. This toothbrush not only guides them to brush with 100% coverage but also coaches them to build better brushing habits.

【Pressure Reminder Protects Kids Gums】Kids don't know they're brushing too hard? This smart toothbrush will notice and remind them by real-time vibration and flashing screens. A great manual toothbrush that helps your kids brush better and protects teeth and gums.

【Smart App for Tracking And Guidance】Parents can track the kids' brushing reports from the smart toothbrush and know whether they brushing thoroughly and for enough time. It will also generate daily, weekly, monthly, and annual personalized guidance to help kids maintain good oral hygiene practices.

【WiFi Compatible for Fun Interaction】Our smart toothbrush supports WiFi connection, you can track kids' brushing performance anytime and anywhere via the internet even if you're not at home. You can also send a fun message to the toothbrush to encourage kids to become better brushers.

【Safe, Ultra-Soft & Ergonomic for Kids】Our smart toothbrush is free from BPA, so it's 100% safe for your kids. The ergonomic handle and ultra-soft bristle can let kids grip the manual toothbrush easily and feel ultra comfortable while brushing.

reviews.title: The more data the better!
reviews.text: A smart toothbrush is an excellent idea! It works and there isn’t enough data when it comes to tooth brushing. It’s helpful to know exactly where to focus, excellent idea for kids. The app works and is easy to find.

reviews.title: Great child toothbrush

reviews.title: Useless don’t buy
reviews.text: This thing is useless.

reviews.title: Pretty cool motivator for kids
reviews.text:
As the product is named, it's a manual toothbrush, so just be sure you're not expecting anything electric here. It still does involve technology as the toothbrush has a display that yields information, such as how long you've been brushing and other messages on your performance. The real feature though is that the toothbrush has a blue sensor in it which you use to connect to an app which gets information on how long you brushed, which areas, if you pressed the brush too hard on your teeth or gums, etc., and spits out a brushing report.

We thought moving to an electric toothbrush would motivate our daughter to brush more a few years ago, and it did, but the results were limited. As she's 8, and at an age where she's really becoming a bookworm, she likes reading the brushing reports and it motivates her to brush herself.

As I said the brush is manual, and obviously the bristles will wear down with time, so the head of the brush is detachable and can be replaced for $3.50 for a set of 2 (price as of January 9, 2023). Obviously, you don't want to buy a whole new brush with technology in it every time the bristles get weaker.

I'm glad this one is getting my daughter to understand to brush correctly and she wants to do it regularly to see how she's doing.

reviews.title: Cool concept to make brushing fine, interactive, and technologically appealing!
reviews.text: This seems like a really neat way to keep track of and encourage brushing teeth. Bluetooth connects to phone and functions via the app you have to download, so in order to use and track, you need to be near the connected phone or tablet. Looking forward to setting it up for my niece to use when she visits.

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.

reviews.title: Nifty toothbrush, brush all the teeth at once
reviews.text:
Just add toothpaste, stick in mouth and brush side to side. Gets all the teeth clean at the same time. Very nifty. The brush head is a little flexible, so it can adjust to her jaw shape. I think the only thing that concerns me is that this is not really teaching the kid how to brush with a regular toothbrush. For now, it's really useful since she gets impatient with brushing teeth.
It came with a spare brush head which just pops on to the small metal rod. It's also very cute.

reviews.title: Simple and easy to use
reviews.text: This little toothbrush is pretty cheap in comparison to others similar to it, but it also doesn’t have any special functions. It just works as is, you put tooth paste between the bristles and then it’s used manually. No vibrations or flashing colors, but it does have a super cute design and hey at least it doesn’t need to be charged because those cords always seem to get lost too lol. Great price point for a bit more of a detailed, deep clean for kiddos’ teeth. Recommend!

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.
